name: The Two Mrs. Grenvilles
overview: Ann, a former chorus girl marries above herself into a rich society family, but her mother-in-law regards her with great suspicion from the start. When Ann shoots her husband dead, claiming she thought he was a prowler, the older Mrs. Grenville decides to back the woman she despises, to protect the family image.

trailers.title: The Two Mrs. Grenvilles 1987 NBC Mini Series Opening
